subject: (no subject)
body: I went past leahs gallery yest..she was there. I saw a painting I liked by john lavalle called a seated woman (for the living room) she told me sh'd sell it for 12 and that it was sold at auction recent for 6 showing me a sticker at the back for 6..I went home, researched the painting..it was indeed sold at auction 2006 for 2875 ! + if the painting she has is not a fake it has a hole in the canvass! She is a piece of work..I still like the picture at 1500/2000 but thought you should know she is still up to her tricks ..what should I do if anything?
